creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
On Mon, 28 Feb 2011 17:50:00 -0600, Jeremy Messenger wrote:
> On Mon, Feb 28, 2011 at 5:32 PM, Aldis Berjoza <aldis@bsdroot.lv> 
> wrote:

>>
>> Btw, I reported this bug to transmission developers (didn't receive 
>> any
>> reply yet)
>> But what I also discovered is that I also don't see transmission 
>> icon in
>> about dialog.
>>
>> Here's screenshot
>> 
>> http://files.bsdroot.lv/my/screenshots/transmission/2011.03.01_at_01.24.33.jpg
>>
>> What I don't understand is why is transmission-qt working fine
>
> Me too as you are first one that report. Your transmission-gtk can't
> local transmission.png for some reason. What do your output of this
> looks like?
>
> # find /usr/local/share/ -name transmission.png
>
> Did you tweak anything like path or else?
>
> Cheers,
> Mezz
>
>> --
>> Aldis Berjoza

 I didn't tweak anything, this time I installed transmission from 
 packages


 desktop.pc $ find /usr/local/share/ -name transmission.png
 /usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/16x16/apps/transmission.png
 /usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/32x32/apps/transmission.png
 /usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/22x22/apps/transmission.png
 /usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/24x24/apps/transmission.png
 /usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/48x48/apps/transmission.png
 /usr/local/share/pixmaps/transmission.png


-- 
 Aldis Berjoza
